name: sentinum_intake
description: Sends patients a secure intake form link when their appointment is created. On submission, populates the encounter note with intake answers and checks the patient in.

protocols.description: On APPOINTMENT_CREATED, generates a signed HMAC intake form link and logs it (Twilio SMS stub). Sends immediately regardless of appointment timing.
Serves the HTML intake form (GET /form), processes form submission (POST /submit), and provides a dev link for local testing (GET /dev-link).
